subcodes.first_line: God testifieth that there is none other God but Him, and He Who hath come with the truth is verily the Hidden Mystery and the Treasured Secret [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو و الذی اتی بالحق انه لهو الغیب المکنون و السر
subcodes.subjects: @being a source of light; guidance, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @station of the Manifestation of God
